originalTitle: Caterpillar’s stock hits a milestone as AI-fueled industrials rally sweeps up Wall Street
summary: Caterpillar is the hottest stock in the Dow this year, and now one of just two in the index with a share price above $1,000.
content: Caterpillar is the hottest stock in the Dow this year, and now one of just two in the index with a share price above $1,000.
chineseTitle: 随着 AI 推动的工业股席卷华尔街，卡特彼勒股价达到里程碑
chineseSummary: 卡特彼勒是今年道琼斯指数中最热门的股票，也是该指数中仅有的两只股价超过 1,000 美元的股票之一。
chineseContent: 卡特彼勒是今年道琼斯指数中最热门的股票，也是该指数中仅有的两只股价超过 1,000 美元的股票之一。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
